noResultsDescription: The trace did not return any results.
noSelectableFeatures: The trace did not return selectable features. Enable "Show graphics" to show aggregated geometry results instead.
noTraceConfigDescription: Use the inputs tab to configure and run a trace.
resultFeaturesAreHidden: The trace returned selectable features, but they are currently hidden in the results tab.

traceErrors.dirtyAreasDiscovered: One or more dirty areas were discovered. Validate the network topology to ensure no dirty areas intersect traceable network features.
traceErrors.noValidControllers: No valid subnetwork controllers found. Ensure there is traversability between the starting point(s) and a valid subnetwork controller.

traceFailedDescription: An error occurred during the trace.
